scientificPurpose: test whether the c12-to-c16 formation-effect change persists at c20 while localizing the diagnosed midstroke field differences

fieldCapture.observationRule: capture is GPU-resident, does not modify populations, geometry, loads, or gate thresholds

sequentialRule.stage1: run the c20 maximum selector at phase offset 0.25
sequentialRule.stage1ContinuationCriterion: absolute c16-to-c20 maximum-saving change divided by absolute c20 saving must be no greater than 0.05
sequentialRule.stage1FailureAction: stop; retain the negative result and do not spend a second c20 run on the minimum selector
sequentialRule.stage2: only after stage1 passes, run the c20 minimum selector at phase offset 0.75
sequentialRule.stage2AcceptanceCriterion: c16-to-c20 best-minus-minimum contrast change divided by absolute c20 contrast must be no greater than 0.05, and both c20 runs must pass every unchanged gate
sequentialRule.quantitativeClaimRule: a quantitative formation-benefit claim remains unauthorized unless both stages pass
